name: hermes-minimax-media
summary: MiniMax (海螺 / minimax) image + video + music generation backends for Hermes Agent. Image: image-01 T2I+I2I. Video: Hailuo-2.3 / Hailuo-02 / S2V-01 T2V+I2V (async). Music: music-2.6 / music-cover / music-cover-free lyrics+prompt -> MP3 (sync). CN endpoint first, global fallback. Install: pip install hermes-minimax-media && hermes-minimax-setup.
author: lora-sys
